items.title: Gilbert Strang, Introduction to Linear Algebra
items.author: Gilbert Strang
items.note: Textbook and course material introducing matrices, matrix multiplication and linear transformations with many engineering examples.

items.title: MIT OpenCourseWare 18.06 Linear Algebra
items.author: MIT OpenCourseWare
items.note: Free lecture videos and notes that explain matrix multiplication as composition of linear maps and illustrate its role in solving systems and analysing eigenvalues.

items.title: Sheldon Axler, Linear Algebra Done Right (3rd Edition)
items.author: Sheldon Axler
items.note: Abstract treatment that develops linear transformations first and then introduces matrices as coordinate representations, clarifying why matrix multiplication matches composition.

items.title: Trefethen and Bau, Numerical Linear Algebra
items.author: Lloyd N. Trefethen and David Bau III
items.note: Advanced text focused on computational aspects of linear algebra, including efficient and stable matrix multiplication, factorisations and algorithms used in large-scale numerical computing and machine learning.
